# UC-15.5.5 · CCTV Video Analytics People-Count Trending

> **Criticality:** Low &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Analytics, Operations &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

People counting validates staffing, queue management, and emergency occupancy limits.

## Value

Informs operations and real-estate utilization without new sensors.

## Implementation

(1) Confirm edge vs server analytics latency. (2) GDPR/privacy review for regions.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-30d
| where match(lower(analytic_type), "(?i)people|occupancy|count")
| eval count=tonumber(coalesce(people_count, occupancy, ""))
| timechart span=1h sum(count) by camera_id
```

## Visualization

Line counts; heatmap by entrance.

## Known False Positives

Capacity alerts during planned hardware refreshes, scheduled rack moves, or new deployments.

## References

- [ONVIF — Open Network Video Interface Forum](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
